title: Social Ibericus
body: Another project for the [socialtec](http://www.xarop.com/tag/socialtec/ "Socialtec") team. I designed the corporate identity and stationery, as well as the website, which in this case is an e-commerce site. I created an attractive design with a strong focus on usability to ensure the shopping experience is as satisfying as possible. [http://www.socialibericus.com](http://www.socialibericus.com)
